stemHtml: Which of the following areas is most prone to experiencing severe Clear Air Turbulence (CAT)?

options.a: On the leeward (downwind) side of a mountain range during flight.
options.b: In a stable atmosphere with no convective activity or wind shear.
options.c: During morning or evening hours with light surface winds.
options.d: 2000 ft above a cumulus cloud in light wind.
